name: Security Federal Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and trust services across South Carolina and Georgia with a community development focus.
description_long:
Security Federal Bank is a traditional community bank operating across South Carolina (Aiken and Columbia areas) and Augusta, Georgia. The institution is FDIC-insured and operates as a designated Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI), positioning itself around a mission of community support and financial inclusion that spans over a century. The bank emphasizes its commitment to giving back to communities and describes itself as "Helping People, Changing Lives."

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail banking products including high-yield checking accounts (up to 4.00% APY on balances up to $10,000), savings accounts, auto loans, home equity lines of credit, and mortgage loans. For business customers, they provide business checking, treasury management services, small business loans, and merchant services. Additional services include trust and wealth management, financial counseling at no cost, and insurance products (home, auto, business) through partner agents. They maintain 7-day branch access and offer online banking with mobile apps for treasury management.

Security Federal differentiates itself through its CDFI status, no-cost financial counseling services, and focus on accessibility with lower minimum balance options on premium accounts. The bank promotes add-on benefits like BaZing fuel credits and roadside assistance through their checking accounts, and has launched new products like Perks Checking with a dedicated app. Their emphasis on community reinvestment and personal relationship banking distinguishes them from larger national competitors.

As a regional community bank, Security Federal is best suited for customers seeking local branch relationships and community-focused banking in South Carolina and Georgia. The competitive checking rates and comprehensive product suite make them viable for both personal and small business banking. However, customers should note the geographic limitation to three specific metropolitan areas and the minimum balance requirements needed to earn advertised APY rates. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: High-yield checking account offering up to 4.00% APY on balances up to $10,000 with lower minimum deposit requirements ($1,000-$2,500)
FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Designated Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI) status providing community-focused lending
No-cost, confidential one-on-one financial counseling services
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, business loans, trust services, and insurance
7-day branch access and online banking with mobile treasury management apps
Perks Checking with dedicated SFB Perks App offering BaZing fuel credits and roadside assistance
cons: Geographic limitation: operates only in Aiken, Columbia SC and Augusta GA areas with no national presence
APY tiers create disincentive for larger deposits (0.25% APY on balances above $10,000)
Requires 12 debit card transactions, 1 ACH transaction, and e-statements monthly to qualify for advertised APY rates, which may be burdensome for some customers
Limited information provided about savings account rates, CD rates, or loan APR ranges on homepage
Fees may reduce earnings on high-yield accounts, per their own disclosure
best_for: South Carolina and Georgia residents seeking community-focused banking with local branch relationships
Small business owners needing treasury management, merchant services, and local business lending
Consumers prioritizing high checking account yields with manageable transaction requirements
Community development-minded customers seeking CDFI-certified financial institutions
diagnosis: Security Federal Bank is best for South Carolina and Georgia residents who value community banking, competitive checking rates, and personalized service. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to three metropolitan areas, making this option unavailable for customers outside Aiken/Columbia SC and Augusta GA.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
